title: Make Announce relay retry-safe
description: Do not irreversibly commit Announce acceptance before required relay transmission succeeds. On failure, clean transient bootstrap state so the same origin sequence can be retried, or use a bounded explicit pending relay.
acceptance_criteria: Transmit failure followed by fresh L2 retry succeeds; no replay/pin leak blocks retry; peer/bootstrap/pending state remains bounded.
close_reason: Staged bounded AnnounceProcessor updates and commit only after required relay TX succeeds; transient bootstrap peer is forgotten on failure. Added same-sequence fresh-frame retry and peer/bootstrap bound test; existing bound regression passes.
